content: We can reframe the intrinsic reward signal that powers curiosity-driven reinforcement learning methods like ICM and RND as a built-in active learning selection mechanism that prioritizes storing high-uncertainty episodic memories to a curious agent’s working memory bank. This creates a self-tuning memory system where only the most uncertainty-reducing experiences are retained for long-term planning, aligning intrinsic exploration with efficient memory usage.
source_topics: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
trigger_topic: curiosity driven reinforcement learning ICM RND compared to curious agent
